connections.gloss: without blemish, complete, full, perfect, sincerely (-ity), sound, without spot, undefiled, upright(-ly), whole.
without blame (blemish, fault, spot), faultless, unblamable
connections.def: from 1 (as a negative particle) and 3470; unblemished (literally or figuratively):--without blame (blemish, fault, spot), faultless, unblamable. see GREEK for 1 see GREEK for
